belt_plugin_enable.label: Belt Plugin Enable
belt_plugin_enable.description: Enable or disable the Belt Plugin post-processing. When enabled, gcode will be modified for belt printer output.

belt_gantry_angle.label: Gantry Angle
belt_gantry_angle.description: The angle of the belt printer gantry in degrees. Use 35 for Leee Printer and 45 for Creality CR-30.

belt_support_minimum_island_area.label: Min. Support Island Area
belt_support_minimum_island_area.description: Minimum area of a surface that requires support. Smaller islands are ignored.

belt_repetitions.label: Print Repetitions
belt_repetitions.description: Number of times to repeat the print on the belt.

belt_repetitions_distance.label: Repetition Distance
belt_repetitions_distance.description: Distance in mm to advance the belt between repetitions.

belt_z_offset_gap.label: Z Offset Gap
belt_z_offset_gap.description: Gap between the nozzle and belt at the start of the print.

belt_raft.label: Belt Raft
belt_raft.description: Add a belt-specific raft under the object.

belt_raft_margin.label: Raft Margin
belt_raft_margin.description: Horizontal margin of the raft from the object in mm.

belt_raft_thickness.label: Raft Thickness
belt_raft_thickness.description: Thickness of the raft in mm.

belt_raft_gap.label: Raft Gap
belt_raft_gap.description: Gap between the raft and the object in mm.

belt_raft_speed.label: Raft Print Speed
belt_raft_speed.description: Print speed for the raft in mm/s.

belt_wall_enabled.label: Belt Wall Adjustment
belt_wall_enabled.description: Adjust speed and flow for walls that touch the belt surface.

belt_wall_speed.label: Belt Wall Speed
belt_wall_speed.description: Maximum speed in mm/min for walls touching the belt.

belt_wall_flow.label: Belt Wall Flow
belt_wall_flow.description: Flow multiplier for walls touching the belt. 1.0 = 100%.

belt_secondary_fans_enabled.label: Secondary Fans
belt_secondary_fans_enabled.description: Enable control of secondary cooling fans (P1).

belt_secondary_fans_speed.label: Secondary Fans Speed Multiplier
belt_secondary_fans_speed.description: Speed multiplier for secondary fans relative to the main fan (0.0 - 1.0).
